title: Search Suggestions System
notes: Time scales at roughly O(N log N) mostly dominated by the initial sort of products, increasing slightly more than 10x for each 10x increase in N (e.g. 1.5ms -> 16.6ms -> 187ms). Space scales O(N) increasing by exactly 10x per step, which is primarily due to Python's Timsort requiring O(N) temporary space during sorting.
